Title: User logs in successfully
Preconditions: User exists in the system
Test Steps:
1. User initiates login process with valid credentials
2. System verifies user credentials
3. System responds with successful login message
Expected Result: User is logged in successfully

Title: User logs in with invalid password
Preconditions: User exists in the system
Test Steps:
1. User initiates login process with incorrect password
2. System verifies user credentials
3. System responds with failed login message
Expected Result: User is not logged in and receives a failure message

Title: User logs in with non-existent username
Preconditions: No user with given username exists
Test Steps:
1. User initiates login process with non-existent username
2. System verifies user credentials
3. System responds with failed login message
Expected Result: User is not logged in and receives a failure message

Title: User logs out successfully
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. User initiates logout process
2. System logs out user
3. System confirms logout
Expected Result: User is logged out successfully

Title: User adds a product to their cart successfully
Preconditions: User is logged in, product exists
Test Steps:
1. User selects a product to add to cart
2. User adds selected product to cart
3. System confirms product addition to cart
Expected Result: Product is added to user's cart successfully

Title: User attempts to add a non-existent product to their cart
Preconditions: User is logged in, product does not exist
Test Steps:
1. User selects a non-existent product to add to cart
2. User attempts to add selected product to cart
3. System responds with error message
Expected Result: Product is not added to cart and user receives an error message

Title: User removes an item from their cart successfully
Preconditions: User is logged in, item exists in cart
Test Steps:
1. User selects an item to remove from cart
2. User removes selected item from cart
3. System confirms item removal from cart
Expected Result: Item is removed from user's cart successfully

Title: User attempts to remove a non-existent item from their cart
Preconditions: User is logged in, item does not exist in cart
Test Steps:
1. User selects a non-existent item to remove from cart
2. User attempts to remove selected item from cart
3. System responds with error message
Expected Result: Item is not removed from cart and user receives an error message

Title: Admin adds a product to the system successfully
Preconditions: Admin is logged in
Test Data: product name: "Smartphone", product description: "Latest smartphone model"
Test Steps:
1. Admin selects a product to add to the system
2. Admin adds selected product to the system
3. System confirms product addition to the system
Expected Result: Product is added to the system successfully

Title: Admin removes an item from a user's cart successfully
Preconditions: Admin is logged in, item exists in user's cart
Test Steps:
1. Admin selects an item to remove from a user's cart
2. Admin removes selected item from user's cart
3. System confirms item removal from user's cart
Expected Result: Item is removed from user's cart successfully

Title: Admin attempts to remove a non-existent item from a user's cart
Preconditions: Admin is logged in, item does not exist in user's cart
Test Steps:
1. Admin selects a non-existent item to remove from a user's cart
2. Admin attempts to remove selected item from user's cart
3. System responds with error message
Expected Result: Item is not removed from user's cart and admin receives an error message
